findings.title: Missing input validation on user-supplied path parameter
findings.description: The path parameter 'id' is passed directly to the repository without sanitization or type checking. An attacker could supply unexpected input leading to unintended behavior.

findings.title: Unhandled promise rejection in repository layer
findings.description: findById does not catch promise rejections. A failed database query propagates as an unhandled rejection, which can crash the Node process in non-recovery configurations.

findings.title: No rate limiting applied to user lookup endpoint
findings.description: The controller does not enforce per-IP or per-user rate limiting, leaving the endpoint open to enumeration.

findings.title: Error details exposed in HTTP response body
findings.description: The catch block forwards the raw error message to the client. Internal stack traces or database error messages may leak implementation details.
